title: Cursed Gear
description: This mod adds cursed and strange armor and tools
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3502679b7aac51afb67c737e020b5848ddcf779f.png)

**Cursed Gear mod** - is a _Vanilla like_ cursed mod that adds several new armor sets and pieces, as well as tools, each with its own mechanics:

**Emerald armor** - if the player is wearing this armor, all nearby villagers will remove it from you
**Emerald tools** - if you strike a villager with any emerald tool, they will not take damage and will offer you discounts and grant a discount effect for other villagers, and will occasionally make _sounds of pleasure..._

**Glass armor** - this armor is very fragile and loses its protective properties when struck 
**Glass tools** - Glass tools are very fragile, so be careful; a glass sword always deals critical damage and can inflict a new effect on a mob or player - Bleeding (increases damage by 1 per second to the mob or player)

**Milk armor** - This armor is very unpleasant; you cannot move quickly while wearing it, and it’s best not to go outside in the rain. However, you can fill buckets with milk, though you cannot drink it yourself. Additionally, cows and goats will always follow you, while cats and ocelots will try to drink you.

**Cheese Armor** - This armor cannot be crafted; you can obtain it by standing in the sun while wearing Milk Armor for about 20 seconds. Sometimes pieces of cheese may break off from this armor, or even mice may crawl out, which will become your companions (they love cheese).

**Chicken Helmet** - If you urgently need to jump from a great height, you can simply press Shift + Right-click on a chicken and put it on your head.



**Cactus Chestplate** - This chestplate doubles your damage, but you take damage while wearing it and attacking anyone.

**Ice Helmet/Boots** - The helmet gives you the Brain Freeze effect, which isn't very pleasant, and the boots let you slowly slide across all blocks; they're pretty useless.

**Goldblock armor** - This is reinforced gold armor that also makes you immune to Piglin attacks, including those from Brute Piglins, but baby Piglins won’t hesitate to steal it from you. Piglins will also happily give you items for free while you’re wearing this armor.

**Undying Chestplate** - This chestplate lets you charge it with **3 Undying Totems** so you don’t have to carry them; they’ll be used automatically when needed.

**Anvil Boots** - They’re very heavy, but you can jump on mobs and players while wearing them, dealing massive damage.

**Target Chestplate** - A dangerous item because every possible projectile is guaranteed to hit you while wearing it.

**TNT Chestplate** - It’s best not to right-click while wearing it

**Bread Sword **- a regular sword that turns everyone into bread,even the Ender Dragon 

**Bed Sword** - causes anyone it touches to fall asleep

**_Fully compatible with JEI_**

![sets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4f9077dd597bde562648416876bcf209a821216.png)
